texto: It is not the monsters we should be afraid of
autor: it is the people that don't recognize the same monsters inside of themself.
explicacao: Orientação direta de it is the people that don't recognize the same monsters inside of themself. sobre temas ligados a reflexao. A afirmação “It is not the monsters we should be afraid of” funciona como lembrete prático ligado a reflexao, shannon-l-alder, monsters, útil em momentos de reflexao.
